message:
test(e2e/referral): cover rewards + stats flows

- validate referrals stats card, structure, and non-negative counters via API helpers
- assert reward limits + per-referral benefit copy on referrals page
- create referral to ensure pending status; verify stats sum integrity
- verify referee benefit copy and rewards-earned caps for new/existing users
- exercise terms, recent referrals section, and mobile/desktop visibility
